steps.title: Secure in a Omni Bead Ruptor...
steps.instruction: Secure in a Omni Bead Ruptor Elite bead beater fitted with a 2 ml tube holder assembly and process at max speed (30 m/s) for 00:05:00 . Rest for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge the ZR BashingBead™ Lysis Tubes (0
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the ZR BashingBead™ Lysis Tubes (0.1 & 0.5 mm) in a microcentrifuge at ≥ 10000 x g, °C, 1 minute .

steps.title: Transfer up to 600 µL supernatant...
steps.instruction: Transfer up to 600 µL supernatant to the Zymo-Spin™ III-F Filter in the labelled Collection Tube and centrifuge at 8.000 x g, , 1 minute . Discard the Zymo-Spin™ III-F Filter.

steps.title: Add 600 µL of ZymoBIOMICS™ DNA...
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL of ZymoBIOMICS™ DNA Binding Buffer to the filtrate in the labelled Collection Tube from Step 4. Mix well.

steps.title: Repeat Step 5 so that the...
steps.instruction: Repeat Step 5 so that the final volume of ZymoBIOMICS™ DNA Binding Buffer added is 1200 µL .

steps.title: Transfer 800 µL of the mixture...
steps.instruction: Transfer 800 µL of the mixture from Step 5 to a Zymo-Spin™ IICR Column in a Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute .

steps.title: Discard the flow through from the...
steps.instruction: Discard the flow through from the Collection Tube and repeat Step 6.

steps.title: Add 400 µL ZymoBIOMICS™ DNA Wash...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL ZymoBIOMICS™ DNA Wash Buffer 1 to the Zymo-Spin™ IICR Column in a new Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute . Discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Add 700 µL ZymoBIOMICS™ DNA Wash...
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL ZymoBIOMICS™ DNA Wash Buffer 2 to the Zymo-Spin™ IICR Column in a Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute . Discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Repeat with 200 µL ZymoBIOMICS™ DNA...
steps.instruction: Repeat with 200 µL ZymoBIOMICS™ DNA Wash Buffer 2 to the Zymo-Spin™ IICR Column in a Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute .

steps.title: Transfer the Zymo-Spin™ IICR Column to a clean 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the Zymo-Spin™ IICR Column to a clean 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and add 100 µL (50 µl minimum) ZymoBIOMICS™ DNase/RNase Free Water directly to the column matrix and incubate for 00:05:00 . Centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute to elute the DNA

steps.title: The filtered DNA is now suitable...
steps.instruction: The filtered DNA is now suitable for PCR and other downstream applications. Eluted DNA should be frozen (–30 to –15°C or –90 to –65°C)

steps.title: Place a Zymo-Spin™ III-HRC Filter in...
steps.instruction: Place a Zymo-Spin™ III-HRC Filter in a new Collection Tube and add 600 µL ZymoBIOMICS™ HRC Prep Solution. Centrifuge at 8.000 x g, , 3 minutes .

steps.title: Transfer the eluted DNA (Step 10)...
steps.instruction: Transfer the eluted DNA (Step 10) to a prepared Zymo-Spin™ III-HRC Filter in a clean 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and centrifuge at exactly 16.000 x g, , 3 minutes .

steps.title: Take 250 mg of food sample...
steps.instruction: Take 250 mg of food sample while on dry ice and transfer to mortar. Add liquid nitrogen until food sample is completely immersed. Using pestle vigorously homogenize sample until a powder forms. Transfer all of the sample to a ZR BashingBead™ Lysis Tube (0.1 & 0.5 mm) . Add 750 µL ZymoBIOMICS™ Lysis Solution to the tube. Cap tightly.
